Tests if converting the string "123456" to a number results in a type of "number".

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks the type conversion functionality of the `Number` function in JavaScript. It verifies that when the string `"123456"` is passed to the `Number` function, the result is of type `number`. This is a basic test to ensure that the `Number` function correctly converts a numeric string into a number type. The assertion will throw an error if the conversion does not result in a `number`, indicating a failure in the expected behavior of the `Number` function.
